name: arbor
description: Initialize and maintain project-local Codex memory with Arbor startup, memory hygiene, and AGENTS drift workflows.

interface.longDescription: Arbor initializes project-local Codex memory, registers project-level hook intents, loads startup context in a stable order, emits memory hygiene packets, and emits AGENTS drift packets when the stable project guide or map may need updates.
defaultPrompt: Resume this repo with Arbor context
